signals.signal_title: Jean-Marc Gilson appointed CEO — former LyondellBasell CEO
signals.signal_description: Jean-Marc Gilson appointed CEO July 2024, previously CEO of LyondellBasell. Brings external chemicals industry perspective to Chao family-controlled company. Driving PEM profitability improvement plan. Board seat added Feb 2026.

enrichment_notes: Integrated petrochemical company — PVC, chlor-alkali, housing and infrastructure products. Houston HQ (STOLA, no channel mismatch). FY2025 revenue $11.17B, EBITDA compressed by chemical cycle downturn — reported EBITDA negative due to $727M goodwill write-off and PEM restructuring charges; underlying EBITDA excl. identified items ~$1.1B. ~16,000 employees. CIO exists per 10-K cybersecurity disclosure but name not publicly available — both CIO and Senior Director Cybersecurity have decades of experience. New CEO Jean-Marc Gilson (appointed Jul 2024, formerly LyondellBasell CEO) driving PEM profitability improvement plan. Family-controlled — Chao family owns ~70%+ which limits strategic IT investment appetite. No MSP confirmed. No M365 evidence. ai_maturity=3 — no digital transformation signals, no AI programs, family-controlled conservative culture, CIO anonymous. Cash position strong ($2.9B), investment-grade. WWT angle: new CEO from LYB may drive modernization; OT at Channelview TX and Lake Charles LA facilities; PVC/chlor-alkali manufacturing IT.
